name: context7-cli
tagline: Wraps the ctx7 CLI to fetch current library docs, install/manage AI coding skills, and configure Context7 MCP for an editor.
verdict: Compact, concrete, well-triggered skill with clear commands and reference-file split. Weak spots: no stated out-of-scope cases, an unpinned global npm install, and no version/changelog signal — otherwise low-risk, no network exfiltration or hidden behavior.

highlights.summary: `npm install -g ctx7@latest` is an unpinned global install pinned only to @latest, no version range.
No 'NOT for' or exclusion text anywhere in description or body.
No version field or changelog anywhere in the file.
